title: Key Virginia election could have major House impacts: Live updates
shortDescription: A high-stakes battle over congressional maps takes place in Virginia. Follow live updates.

title: Grindr set to host inaugural White House Correspondents' Dinner party
shortDescription: Grindr is getting into the spirit of the White House Correspondents’ Association Dinner, hosting its first-ever party ahead of the annual event.

title: Tucker Carlson apologizes for supporting Trump
shortDescription: On an April 20 episode of “The Tucker Carlson Show,” Tucker Carlson said he is “implicated” in the Iran war for supporting President Donald Trump.

title: Trump praises Tim Cook after Apple CEO steps down
shortDescription: In a lengthy post, Trump described a "very nice" relationship with outgoing Apple CEO Tim Cook, who he said he had helped through his tenure.

title: Trump's approval rating has stalled, new poll shows. Here's why
shortDescription: With the war in Iran potentially escalating, President Donald Trump's job approval rating stalls at 36%, its lowest level, a new Reuters/Ipsos poll shows.

title: Florida Democrat mired in scandal resigns from Congress
shortDescription: Many House Democrats refrained from supporting Florida Rep. Sheila Cherfilus-McCormick, who is accused of more than two dozen ethics violations.

title: Trump’s beef with the pope could cost him politically
shortDescription: Trump’s conflict with the pontiff has divided Catholic supporters and could hurt him politically.

title: Trump talks Warsh, economy on CNBC
shortDescription: President Donald Trump discusses Fed nominee Kevin Warsh and blasts the Supreme Court's tariff ruling during an April 21 CNBC "Squawk Box" interview.

title: Pope Leo XIV says he is not looking to debate President Trump | The Excerpt
shortDescription: President Donald Trump has been clashing with Pope Leo XIV for weeks now in a rare and increasingly public dispute.

title: Trump brings 'lot of people' but 'mellow' vibe in Turning Point USA visit
shortDescription: Trump at Turning Point USA event April 17, 2026: Arizona Republic’s Stephanie Murray describes Trump rally vibe as “mellow” ahead of midterm elections.

title: Trump on Iran cease fire status
shortDescription: In an interview on CNBC’s “Squawk Box,” President Donald Trump said he does not want to extend the cease fire with Iran.

title: Lawsuit filed to prevent DOJ from reviewing state voter lists
shortDescription: Civil-rights groups are suing to prevent the Justice Department from collecting and reviewing state registration lists to weed out ineligible voters.

title: Texas eyes clinical trials over ibogaine as Trump signs executive order
shortDescription: Texas lawmakers are eyeing clinical trial for ibogaine as President Trump signed an executive order to speed up research into psychedelic drugs for veterans.

title: Trump extends ceasefire until Iran can submit key proposal: Updates
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said the United States will extend a ceasefire with Iran until the Middle Eastern country can unify around a proposal.

title: A law to spy on foreigners is deeply dividing Congress. Here’s why.
shortDescription: Both libertarians and progressives in Congress are standing in the way of renewing a key spying law that national security officials say is crucial.

title: Democrats seek edge from Virginia in Trump's redistricting battle
shortDescription: Polling shows a close contest in the swing state where Republicans could lose all but one congressional seat if Old Dominion State voters choose "yes"

title: Fraud arrests in 2020 election case 'coming soon,' FBI chief says
shortDescription: President Donald Trump for years has repeated debunked claims that the 2020 election he lost was 'rigged.' Patel says FBI has 'information' backing Trump.
